I believe, that in highschool it is the main thing, that greatly determines to the child's future. For example, in Russia students write state exam after school. If you write it well, you would be able to study in a great university in a big city. If you don't - then you would have to study in a weaker regional university. Obviosly, to pass all the exams, you should prepare for them. And prepare well.\\n\\nFrom the other hand, graduates, who are aimed only to the preparing for exams, usually spend all their efforts to the main subjects. That leads to the awful situation: students don't know at least anything in other things. It is also bad, because students in school should improve in different fields.\\n\\nSumming up, I believe, that in highschool it is really important to pay attention to preparing for exams. But at the same time schools shouldn't forget about other subjects.", "strength_type": "Text organization", "note": ""}], "feedback": "This response is at B1. However, some luck is always helpful. A person should put a lot of effort into the job to reach his goals. Of course, sometimes people can achieve something because they are lucky. However, their success won't last too long without hard work. There are countless examples of people who werelucky enough to be born with a great talant but later couldn't achieve anything because of being too lazy and self-assured . Luck can help you once and let you down later. That's why you should never rely on it. Hard work is fundamental . As they say, hard work alwaysbeats talant. I totally agree with the saying. No luck is helpful if you are a lazy person. On my point of view, all successful people are hardworking. On the other hand, luck and talant can help you start and solve some difficulties. Taking risks can sometimes bring you up and you can use some luck on your path to success. All in all, I think you should put all the effort into the work. If you do it, luck will eventually come.
